data_driven_proof.conclusion: NO SAFE CTR TARGET EXISTS outside the 7 cooldown pages. All 12 known impression pages are either: (a) the 7 fixed pages (CTR fixes applied, in cooldown), (b) low-value geo/tool pages, or (c) unidentified guide page.
data_driven_proof.honest_assessment: The 7 fixed pages ARE the CTR targets. Their fixes are deployed and titles verified. They need Google re-crawl, not more edits.
